curation_notes: Patch commit cd84a0b was directly referenced in the advisory. It modifies two files: FunctionBody.h (MapFunctionObjectTypes) and FunctionBody.cpp (RegisterFunctionObjectType). The MapFunctionObjectTypes template function omitted undeferredFunctionType when iterating over function object types during entry point cleanup, leaving stale JIT entry points after garbage collection. The patch adds explicit iteration over undeferredFunctionType and updates the assert in RegisterFunctionObjectType accordingly. Pre-assigned as buffer-overflow from CWE-787, but the patch clearly fixes a use-after-free: the missing type iteration causes stale JIT code to reference freed/GC'd memory — reclassified to use-after-free.
